name: eval spec schema: rationale field (when present) must be non-empty string (§2.4)
command: echo '{"name":"t","command":"echo hi","setup":[],"expect":{"exit_code":0},"rationale":""}' > spec.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-eval-spec.sh" spec.json 2>&1 | grep -q "rationale" && echo ok >&2
